name: @forgeax/engine-vite-plugin-shader
description: Vite plugin: thin forwarding shell over @forgeax/engine-shader-compiler — 4 hook (load/transform/generateBundle/handleHotUpdate) + ShaderError → RollupLog wrap (hint 顶层 + meta 双投影).

fps.reason: build-time vite plugin shell, no runtime canvas

bench.reason: thin forwarding layer over @forgeax/engine-shader-compiler; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

gate.reason: physical-isolation grep gates (check-shader-no-naga-in-dist + check-shader-runtime-deps + check-shader-no-compiler-import) are repo-root scripts wired into ci.yml lint job, not a per-package gate
